source_name: Code4rena Kinetiq Findings and Analysis Report (2025-04) - Low Risk and Non-Critical Issues
issue_claim: Absence of Slippage Protection in Token Conversion
why_it_looked_bad: No slippage protection during token conversion risks user losses from unfavorable rates.
why_not_valid: lack of slippage protection is a caution pattern; severity depends on whether conversion price movement is attacker-controlled and loss-bearing
downgrade_reason: lack of slippage protection is a caution pattern; severity depends on whether conversion price movement is attacker-controlled and loss-bearing
trust_assumption: Treat as a caution/false-positive reference unless the current target shows permissionless reachability, direct value loss, and concrete affected code path.
when_it_could_be_real: if combined with permissionless access, stale oracle data, or large unbounded sets
if protocol configuration makes this path critical to solvency or withdrawal availability
